projectDescription: A Bash-based advanced phishing tool with 30+ login page templates and multiple port forwarding options for Linux and Termux.
keyFeatures: 30+ phishing page templates for popular platforms (Facebook, Instagram, Google, Netflix, etc.)
5 port forwarding/tunneling options: LocalHost, Ngrok, Serveo, LocalXpose, LocalHostRun
Automatic credential capture and logging to files
Victim IP address capture and logging
Custom subdomain support for Serveo and LocalXpose tunnels
Multiple template variants per platform (e.g., Facebook: Traditional, Messenger, Voting Poll, Security)
publicApiSurface: bash setup — Install dependencies and set up environment (Linux)
bash tmux_setup — Install dependencies and set up environment (Termux/Android)
bash nexphisher — Launch the interactive phishing tool menu

Template options: facebook, instagram, google, microsoft, netflix, paypal, steam, twitter, playstation, github, twitch, pinterest, snapchat, linkedin, ebay, dropbox, protonmail, spotify, reddit, adobe, deviantart, badoo, origin, cryptocoinsniper, yahoo, wordpress, yandex, stackoverflow, vk, xbox
Tunnel options: localhost (127.0.0.1:5555), ngrok, serveo, localxpose, localhostrun
